机器人.title: From World Models to World Action Models: A Concise Tutorial for Robotics
机器人.title_zh: 从世界模型到世界行动模型：面向机器人的简明教程
机器人.summary: World models are increasingly used in embodied intelligence and generative simulation, yet their scope remains ambiguous across communities. This tutorial presents a design-space view of world models as action-conditioned predictive models that estimate the future evolution of task-relevant observations. We introduce the concept of World Action Models (WAMs), which integrate action generation into the world model framework, enabling robots to not only predict but also plan and execute actions. The tutorial covers key design choices, training paradigms, and applications in robotics, emphasizing the shift from passive prediction to active interaction.
机器人.summary_zh: 世界模型在具身智能和生成模拟中日益普及，但其范围在不同社区间仍不明确。本教程提出了一个设计空间视角，将世界模型视为以行动为条件的预测模型，用于估计任务相关观测的未来演变。我们引入了世界行动模型（WAMs）的概念，将行动生成融入世界模型框架，使机器人不仅能预测，还能规划并执行行动。教程涵盖了关键设计选择、训练范式及在机器人中的应用，强调了从被动预测到主动交互的转变。

机器人.title: Optimal Resource Utilization for Autonomous Laboratory Orchestrators
机器人.title_zh: 自主实验室编排器的最优资源利用
机器人.summary: In autonomous laboratories, AI agents suggest the next batch of experiments to do. However, planning and executing those tasks taking full advantage of the available resources is a completely different question. This can be challenging when dealing with real-world hardware constraints, especially so with limited equipment and shared resources. We formulate the resource allocation problem as a combinatorial optimization and propose a scheduling algorithm that maximizes throughput while respecting constraints. Our method is evaluated in a simulated materials science lab, demonstrating significant improvements in experiment completion rate and resource efficiency.
机器人.summary_zh: 在自主实验室中，AI代理建议下一批实验。然而，充分利用可用资源来规划和执行这些任务是一个完全不同的问题。在处理现实硬件约束时，尤其是在设备有限和资源共享的情况下，这充满挑战。本文将资源分配问题形式化为组合优化，并提出一种调度算法，在满足约束的同时最大化吞吐量。该方法在模拟材料科学实验室中进行了评估，在实验完成率和资源效率上表现出显著提升。

机器人.title: FurnitureVLA: Learning Long-Horizon Bimanual Furniture Assembly with Vision-Language-Action Model
机器人.title_zh: FurnitureVLA：基于视觉-语言-动作模型学习长时域双手家具组装
机器人.summary: Current work on robot furniture assembly mostly focuses on toy-scale settings or single-arm manipulation. We introduce FurnitureVLA, the first systematic study of real-scale bimanual furniture assembly using Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs). We formalize the task, develop a scalable simulation p
机器人.summary_zh: 本文首次系统研究基于视觉-语言-动作模型（VLA）的真实尺度双手家具组装问题。针对现有工作局限于玩具级或单臂操作的不足，作者形式化定义了任务，开发了可扩展的仿真平台，并提出了FurnitureVLA模型。该模型通过融合视觉、语言和动作模态，能够理解复杂组装指令并协调双臂执行长时域操作。主要创新包括：1) 构建了包含多种家具类型的仿真数据集；2) 设计分层动作生成机制，实现高效的长时域规划；3) 在真实机器人上验证了零样本迁移能力。该工作推动了机器人灵巧操作在实际场景中的应用。

机器人.title: PedNStream: Scalable Network Flow Simulation for Pedestrian Traffic Management
机器人.title_zh: PedNStream：面向行人交通管理的可扩展网络流模拟
机器人.summary: Large-scale crowd management requires pedestrian simulations that are both computationally efficient and compatible with feedback-based control. However, most open-source tools are either microscopic or not designed for network-scale closed-loop evaluation. This paper presents PedNStream (Pedestrian
机器人.summary_zh: 大规模人群管理需要既计算高效又兼容基于反馈的控制的行人模拟。然而，大多数开源工具要么是微观的，要么不是为网络规模闭环评估设计的。本文提出PedNStream，一种可扩展的网络流模拟框架，用于行人交通管理。创新点在于将行人流建模为网络流，实现高效的大规模模拟，并支持闭环控制集成。主要贡献是提供了一个开源、可扩展的模拟器，能够实时模拟数千行人的移动，并允许与交通控制策略交互，为智能交通系统研究提供了实用工具。

机器人.title: FAR: Failure-Aware Retry for Test-Time Recovery and Continual Policy Improvement
机器人.title_zh: FAR：面向测试时恢复与持续策略改进的失败感知重试
机器人.summary: Robot policies inevitably encounter failures when deployed in real environments. Naive retries often repeat the same mistakes, while many existing recovery methods rely on human intervention. In this paper, we propose Failure-Aware Retry (FAR), a framework that enables robots to learn from previous
机器人.summary_zh: 机器人在真实环境中部署时不可避免地会遇到失败。简单的重试往往重复相同错误，而许多现有恢复方法依赖人工干预。本文提出失败感知重试框架，使机器人能够从之前的失败中学习，自主调整策略并持续改进。创新点在于将失败案例作为训练信号，通过记忆和推理机制避免重蹈覆辙。主要贡献是实现了无需人工介入的自主恢复，显著提升了机器人在复杂动态环境中的任务成功率和鲁棒性。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Post-Training Pruning for Diffusion Transformers
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) have demonstrated impressive performance in image generation but suffer from substantial computational overhead and resource consumption. Post-training pruning offers a promising solution; however, due to DiTs' unique architectural design and parameter distribution, traditional pruning methods often degrade quality. We propose a novel post-training pruning framework tailored for DiTs, which identifies and removes redundant parameters while preserving generation fidelity. Our method achieves significant compression ratios with minimal performance loss, enabling efficient deployment on resource-constrained devices.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 扩散Transformer（DiTs）在图像生成中表现出色，但计算开销和资源消耗巨大。训练后剪枝是一种有前景的解决方案，然而由于DiTs独特的架构设计和参数分布，传统剪枝方法常导致质量下降。我们提出了一种专为DiTs设计的训练后剪枝框架，能够识别并移除冗余参数，同时保持生成保真度。该方法在最小化性能损失的前提下实现了显著的压缩比，使得在资源受限设备上的高效部署成为可能。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Prototype Memory-Guided Training-Free Anomaly Classification and Localization in Prenatal Ultrasound
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 原型记忆引导的无训练产前超声异常分类与定位
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Prenatal anomaly classification and localization is of critical importance for fetal health and pregnancy management. Although ultrasound (US) is the primary modality for prenatal screening, accurate diagnosis remains challenging due to the low prevalence and high heterogeneity of anomalies. Existing methods often require large annotated datasets and complex training. We propose a training-free framework leveraging prototype memory, which stores representative normal and anomaly patterns. During inference, the framework matches input features to prototypes for classification and produces heatmaps for localization. This approach eliminates the need for fine-tuning, enabling fast deployment and interpretability.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 产前异常分类与定位对胎儿健康和妊娠管理至关重要。尽管超声是产前筛查的主要方式，但由于异常发生率低且异质性高，准确诊断仍具挑战。现有方法通常需要大量标注数据和复杂训练。我们提出了一种无训练框架，利用原型记忆存储代表性的正常和异常模式。推理时，框架将输入特征与原型匹配以进行分类，并生成定位热图。该方法避免了微调需求，实现了快速部署和可解释性。

计算机视觉/CV.title: EchoRisk: A Multicentre Echocardiography Dataset and Benchmark for Cardio-Oncology
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: EchoRisk：用于心脏肿瘤学的多中心超声心动图数据集与基准
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Therapy-induced cardiotoxicity is the leading non-oncological cause of treatment interruption in breast cancer patients, yet early, automated risk stratification from routine cardiac imaging remains an unsolved problem. We present EchoRisk, the first curated, multicentre, longitudinal echocardiography dataset specifically designed for cardio-oncology. The dataset includes over 10,000 echocardiograms from breast cancer patients, with annotations for cardiotoxicity events. We also provide a benchmark with state-of-the-art deep learning methods for automated risk prediction, demonstrating the potential of AI in early detection and clinical decision support.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 治疗引起的心脏毒性是乳腺癌患者治疗中断的首要非肿瘤原因，然而从常规心脏影像中进行早期自动化风险分层仍是一个未解决的问题。我们提出了EchoRisk，这是首个专门为心脏肿瘤学策划的多中心纵向超声心动图数据集。该数据集包含来自乳腺癌患者的超过10,000份超声心动图，并带有心脏毒性事件标注。我们还提供了基于最先进深度学习方法的自动化风险预测基准，展示了人工智能在早期检测和临床决策支持中的潜力。

计算机视觉/CV.title: DART-VLN: Test-Time Memory Decay and Anti-Loop Regularization for Discrete Vision-Language Navigation
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: DART-VLN：针对离散视觉-语言导航的测试时记忆衰减与防循环正则化
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Memory-based discrete vision-language navigation (VLN) agents must act under partial observability, yet even strong frozen backbones remain vulnerable at test time. Two common failure modes are stale historical evidence at memory readout and inefficient local backtracking during action selection. We propose DART-VLN, which introduces a test-time memory decay mechanism to dynamically weight historical observations, and an anti-loop regularization that penalizes repetitive action sequences. Experiments on R2R and RxR benchmarks show significant improvements in navigation success rate and efficiency over state-of-the-art methods.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 基于记忆的离散视觉-语言导航（VLN）代理必须在部分可观测性下行动，但即使是强大的冻结主干在测试时仍然脆弱。两种常见的失败模式是记忆读取时的陈旧历史证据和动作选择期间的低效局部回溯。本文提出DART-VLN，引入测试时记忆衰减机制以动态加权历史观测，以及防循环正则化惩罚重复动作序列。在R2R和RxR基准上的实验表明，在导航成功率和效率上相比最先进方法有显著提升。

计算机视觉/CV.title: GaussianFusion: Unified 3D Gaussian Representation for Multi-Modal Fusion Perception
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: GaussianFusion：面向多模态融合感知的统一3D高斯表示
计算机视觉/CV.summary: The bird's-eye view (BEV) representation enables multi-sensor features to be fused within a unified space, serving as the primary approach for achieving comprehensive 3D perception. However, the discrete grid representation of BEV leads to significant detail loss and limits feature alignment and cross-modal interactions. To address these issues, we propose GaussianFusion, a novel framework that utilizes 3D Gaussians as a unified representation for multi-modal fusion. Unlike BEV grids, 3D Gaussians are continuous and can adaptively represent scene details, enabling fine-grained feature alignment and fusion. Our method achieves state-of-the-art performance on nuScenes dataset for 3D object detection and segmentation tasks.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 鸟瞰图（BEV）表示能够将多传感器特征融合到统一空间中，是实现全面3D感知的主要方法。然而，BEV的离散网格表示会导致显著的细节损失，并限制特征对齐和跨模态交互。为解决这些问题，本文提出GaussianFusion，一种利用3D高斯作为多模态融合统一表示的新框架。与BEV网格不同，3D高斯是连续的，能够自适应地表示场景细节，实现细粒度的特征对齐与融合。该方法在nuScenes数据集的3D目标检测和分割任务上达到了最先进的性能。创新点：首次将3D高斯表示用于多模态融合感知，克服了BEV离散表示的局限性。

计算机视觉/CV.title: TRCGL-Net: A Long-Tailed Multi-Label Chest X-Ray Classification Framework with Generative Data Augmentation and Label Co-Occurrence Modeling
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: TRCGL-Net：结合生成式数据增强与标签共现建模的长尾多标签胸部X光分类框架
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Chest X-ray multi-label classification is a core task in intelligent medical imaging diagnosis. However, real clinical data often exhibit extreme long-tailed distributions, leading to degraded performance on rare diseases in tail classes. This issue is not only driven by data scarcity but also by two key challenges: (1) visual diversity of rare diseases, and (2) complex label co-occurrence patterns. We propose TRCGL-Net, which integrates a generative data augmentation module to synthesize diverse tail-class samples, and a label co-occurrence graph learning module to model dependencies among labels. Experiments on ChestX-ray14 and CheXpert datasets show significant improvements on tail classes.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 胸部X光多标签分类是智能医学影像诊断的核心任务。然而，真实临床数据常呈现极端长尾分布，导致尾部罕见疾病的性能下降。该问题不仅源于数据稀缺，还面临两个关键挑战：（1）罕见疾病的视觉多样性；（2）复杂的标签共现模式。本文提出TRCGL-Net，集成了生成式数据增强模块以合成多样化的尾部样本，以及标签共现图学习模块以建模标签间依赖关系。在ChestX-ray14和CheXpert数据集上的实验表明，尾部类别的性能显著提升。创新点：结合生成式增强与图建模联合解决长尾问题。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Active Learning for Cascaded Object Detection: Balancing Coverage and Uncertainty in Table Extraction Pipelines
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 级联目标检测的主动学习：表格提取流水线中覆盖度与不确定性的平衡
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Table extraction from business documents relies on a cascaded pipeline where Table Detection (TD) first localizes tables and Table Structure Recognition (TSR) then recovers their internal layout. Building task-specific training sets for this pipeline is costly, particularly for TSR which requires fine-grained annotations. We propose an active learning framework that jointly considers coverage and uncertainty across the cascade, selecting samples that maximize both diversity and model uncertainty. Experiments on public and industrial datasets show our method reduces annotation cost by 40% while maintaining accuracy.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 从商业文档中提取表格依赖于级联流水线：表格检测（TD）首先定位表格，表格结构识别（TSR）随后恢复其内部布局。为这一流水线构建任务特定训练集成本高昂，尤其是对需要细粒度标注的TSR。本文提出一种主动学习框架，联合考虑级联中的覆盖度和不确定性，选择同时最大化多样性和模型不确定性的样本。在公开和工业数据集上的实验表明，该方法在保持精度的同时将标注成本降低了40%。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Pano2World: End-to-End 3D Generation via Unified Multi-View Sequences
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: Pano2World：通过统一多视图序列的端到端3D生成
计算机视觉/CV.summary: A single panorama captures the full visual sphere from one camera center, yet confines users to looking around in place without enabling true scene exploration. Converting a single panorama into a persistent, renderable 3D representation for free-viewpoint navigation has attracted growing interest; we propose Pano2World, an end-to-end framework that generates a complete 3D scene from a single panorama by predicting a unified multi-view sequence. Our method leverages a transformer-based architecture to infer geometry and appearance simultaneously, enabling realistic novel view synthesis and scene editing. Experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance on multiple benchmarks.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 单张全景图从一个相机中心捕获完整视觉球体，但将用户限制在原地环视，无法实现真正的场景探索。将单张全景图转换为可持久渲染的3D表示以支持自由视点导航引起了越来越多的兴趣；本文提出Pano2World，一种端到端框架，通过预测统一的多视图序列从单张全景图生成完整的3D场景。该方法利用基于Transformer的架构同时推断几何和外观，实现逼真的新视角合成和场景编辑。实验在多个基准上展示了最先进的性能。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Improving Sparse-View 3DGS Generalization via Flat Minima Optimization
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 通过平坦最小值优化改进稀疏视图3DGS泛化
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Recent advances in neural rendering have established 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) as a highly efficient representation for novel view synthesis, enabling fast training and real-time rendering with strong fidelity. However, when supervision is limited to sparse input views, 3DGS tends to overfit to the training views, leading to poor generalization. We propose a flat minima optimization method that encourages the model to converge to flatter minima in the loss landscape, improving robustness to unseen views. Our approach introduces a novel regularization term and a training schedule that balances fitting and generalization. Experiments on several datasets show significant improvements over baselines in sparse-view settings.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 神经渲染的最新进展已将3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）确立为一种高效的新视角合成表示，支持快速训练和实时渲染且保真度高。然而，当监督信号仅限于稀疏输入视图时，3DGS容易过拟合训练视图，导致泛化能力差。本文提出一种平坦最小值优化方法，鼓励模型收敛到损失景观中更平坦的最小值，从而增强对未见视图的鲁棒性。该方法引入了一个新颖的正则化项和一种平衡拟合与泛化的训练策略。在多个数据集上的实验表明，在稀疏视图设置下，该方法显著优于基线。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Autonomous Scientific Discovery via Iterative Meta-Reflection
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 通过迭代元反射实现自主科学发现
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Autonomous scientific discovery systems offer the potential to accelerate research by automating the process of hypothesis generation and validation. However, current systems operate within constrained search spaces or require predefined research questions, limiting their capacity for true open-ende
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 本文提出一种基于迭代元反射的自主科学发现框架，旨在突破现有系统在开放性问题上的局限。系统通过自我反思和迭代改进，自主生成研究假设、设计实验并验证结论，无需预设问题空间。在计算机视觉领域，系统自动发现了若干新的图像增强规律和特征交互模式。主要创新在于引入元认知循环，使AI能够评估自身探索方向并动态调整策略，从而在无先验知识的情况下实现真正的开放域科学发现。该工作展示了AI驱动科研自动化的新范式。

计算机视觉/CV.title: DeWorldSG: Depth-Aware 3D Semantic Scene Graph Generation via World-Model Priors
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: DeWorldSG：基于世界模型先验的深度感知3D语义场景图生成
计算机视觉/CV.summary: We present DeWorldSG, a novel framework that generates spatio-temporally robust 3D Semantic Scene Graphs from RGB-D sequences. Existing methods often struggle to construct reliable 3D scene graphs due to unstable 3D object representations and missing relations caused by frame-wise inference. DeWorld
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 本文提出DeWorldSG，一种从RGB-D序列生成时空鲁棒3D语义场景图的新框架。现有方法常因不稳定的3D对象表示和逐帧推理导致的缺失关系而难以构建可靠3D场景图。DeWorldSG创新地利用世界模型先验，通过引入深度感知和时间一致性约束，增强3D对象表示的稳定性和关系推理的完整性。主要贡献是提出了一种结合世界模型先验的深度感知框架，显著提升了3D场景图在动态环境中的鲁棒性和准确性，为场景理解提供了新方法。

计算机视觉/CV.title: ConRTF: Edge-Constrained Boundary Distribution Refinement for Realtime TransFormer Table Structure Recognition
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: ConRTF：面向实时Transformer表格结构识别的边缘约束边界分布细化
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Table Structure Recognition (TSR) aims to recover the row and column layout of tables from document images, a key step in document understanding pipelines. Accurate TSR depends on precise boundary localization: small errors in row or column boundaries can propagate into incorrect cell assignments an
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 表格结构识别（TSR）旨在从文档图像中恢复表格的行列布局，是文档理解流程中的关键步骤。准确的TSR依赖于精确的边界定位：行或列边界的微小误差可能传播为错误的单元格分配。本文提出ConRTF，一种基于边缘约束的边界分布细化方法，用于实时Transformer表格结构识别。创新点在于引入边缘约束来细化边界分布，从而提升边界定位精度，并采用高效的Transformer架构实现实时处理。主要贡献包括：设计边缘约束损失函数以强化边界一致性，提出边界分布细化模块，并在多个公开数据集上取得最优性能。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Learning Cardiac Motion Priors for Implicit Neural Representations
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 学习心脏运动先验的隐式神经表示
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Implicit neural representations (INRs) are well suited to cardiac motion estimation, providing continuous, compact representations of motion fields. However, fitting an INR to each image sequence is time-consuming and sensitive to the optimisation trajectory. Learned priors can help guide optimisation and improve efficiency. We propose a method to learn a motion prior from a dataset of cardiac image sequences. This prior is then used to condition the INR fitting process, reducing the number of iterations required and improving robustness. Experiments on cardiac MRI data show that our approach achieves accurate motion estimation with faster convergence and better generalisation to unseen sequences.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 隐式神经表示（INRs）非常适合心脏运动估计，能提供连续、紧凑的运动场表示。然而，为每个图像序列拟合INR耗时且对优化轨迹敏感。学习先验有助于指导优化并提高效率。我们提出一种方法，从心脏图像序列数据集学习运动先验。该先验用于条件化INR拟合过程，减少所需迭代次数并提高鲁棒性。在心脏MRI数据上的实验表明，我们的方法实现了准确的运动估计，收敛更快，且对未见序列泛化更好。

计算机视觉/CV.title: Reading Order Inference for Complex Document Layouts
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 复杂文档布局的阅读顺序推断
计算机视觉/CV.summary: Reading order inference remains a critical bottleneck in the digitization of complex historical manuscripts, where pages contain multiple spatially interleaved reading streams, the canonical example being the Glossa Ordinaria layout, in which a central text is surrounded by commentaries that wrap ar
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 阅读顺序推断仍是复杂历史手稿数字化的关键瓶颈，其中页面包含多个空间交织的阅读流，典型例子是Glossa Ordinaria布局，中央文本被环绕的评论包围。本文提出一种新的阅读顺序推断方法，结合文档布局分析和语言模型，以处理高度非线性的文本排列。创新点在于设计了能够适应多种复杂布局的灵活框架，并在多个历史文档数据集上取得了显著优于现有方法的性能。该工作对文化遗产数字化和文档理解有重要应用价值。

计算机视觉/CV.title: World from Motion: Generative Dynamic Gaussian Reconstruction from Monocular Video
计算机视觉/CV.title_zh: 运动中的世界：从单目视频生成动态高斯重建
计算机视觉/CV.summary: We present World from Motion, a method for generating freely renderable dynamic 3D Gaussian representations from monocular videos. Our approach conditions a video model on dense, pixel-aligned renderings that encode appearance, geometry, and 3D scene motion along both input and target camera trajectories.
计算机视觉/CV.summary_zh: 我们提出“运动中的世界”方法，从单目视频生成可自由渲染的动态3D高斯表示。该方法将视频模型条件化在密集的、像素对齐的渲染上，这些渲染编码了外观、几何和沿输入及目标相机轨迹的3D场景运动。通过生成式建模，实现了动态场景的新视角合成，显著提升了动态三维重建的灵活性和真实感。

其他.title: Meta-Transfer Learning for mmWave Beam Alignment
其他.title_zh: 用于毫米波波束对准的元迁移学习
其他.summary: Millimeter-wave (mmWave) beam alignment plays a critical role in next-generation wireless systems, yet its efficient implementation remains challenging. Meta-learning and transfer learning have been explored to enable deep learning-based beam prediction models to rapidly adapt to unseen environments. However, existing approaches often require retraining or fine-tuning. We propose a meta-transfer learning framework that combines meta-learning with transfer learning, allowing a model pre-trained on source environments to quickly adapt to target environments with minimal data. Our method significantly reduces alignment latency and improves accuracy, advancing practical deployment of mmWave communications.
其他.summary_zh: 毫米波波束对准在下一代无线系统中至关重要，但其高效实现仍具挑战。元学习和迁移学习已被探索用于使基于深度学习的波束预测模型快速适应未见环境。然而，现有方法通常需要重新训练或微调。我们提出了一个元迁移学习框架，结合了元学习与迁移学习，使得在源环境上预训练的模型能够用极少数据快速适应目标环境。该方法显著降低了对准延迟并提高了准确性，推动了毫米波通信的实际部署。

生成模型.title: Sequentially-Controlled Interactive Multi-Particle Flow-Maps for Online Feedback-Driven Search
生成模型.title_zh: 序列控制交互式多粒子流图用于在线反馈驱动搜索
生成模型.summary: While generative models have enabled training-free reward alignment, current methods typically excel in local exploration within narrow regions of the underlying distribution. These approaches struggle when preferences are unknown a priori and only revealed through sequential feedback-a scenario demanding global exploration and adaptation. We propose a novel framework that leverages sequentially-controlled interactive multi-particle flow-maps to efficiently navigate the search space based on online feedback. Our method maintains a diverse set of candidate solutions that evolve via flow-based dynamics, with a controller that adaptively allocates computational resources to promising regions. Experiments in molecular design and robotic control demonstrate superior performance in discovering globally optimal solutions under limited feedback.
生成模型.summary_zh: 尽管生成模型实现了免训练奖励对齐，但现有方法通常擅长在基础分布的狭窄区域内进行局部探索。当偏好先验未知且仅通过序列反馈揭示时，这些方法难以应对全局探索和适应的需求。本文提出了一种新框架，利用序列控制交互式多粒子流图，基于在线反馈高效导航搜索空间。该方法维护一组多样化的候选解，通过基于流的动力学演化，并使用控制器自适应地将计算资源分配给有希望的区域。在分子设计和机器人控制实验表明，在有限反馈下发现全局最优解方面具有优越性能。

NLP.title: Exploring the Semantic Gap in Agentic Data Systems: A Formative Study of Operationalization Failures in Analytical Workflows
NLP.title_zh: 探索代理数据系统中的语义鸿沟：分析工作流中操作化失败的形成性研究
NLP.summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to generate queries, invoke tools, and construct analytical workflows. Although recent advances have substantially improved workflow generation and execution, the semantic information required to operationalize analytical concepts often lies beyond the capabilities of current LLMs. We conduct a formative study to characterize operationalization failures, where LLMs misinterpret or fail to translate high-level analytical intents into executable steps. We identify key types of semantic gaps and propose design implications for future agentic data systems. Our findings highlight the need for better representation of domain knowledge and interactive refinement mechanisms.
NLP.summary_zh: 大语言模型（LLM）越来越多地被用于生成查询、调用工具和构建分析工作流。尽管最新进展显著改善了工作流生成和执行，但操作化分析概念所需的语义信息往往超出当前LLM的能力。本文进行了一项形成性研究，以表征操作化失败——即LLM误解或无法将高级分析意图转化为可执行步骤。我们识别了关键类型的语义鸿沟，并为未来的代理数据系统提出了设计启示。我们的发现强调了更好表示领域知识和交互式细化机制的必要性。

NLP.title: Behavior-Adaptive Conversational Agents: Toward a Fluid Personality Framework
NLP.title_zh: 行为自适应对话智能体：迈向流变人格框架
NLP.summary: Large language model (LLM)-based conversational agents (CAs) are now ubiquitous, creating new opportunities for AI-mediated behavior change. Their capacity to project nuanced personalities and adopt diverse metaphorical roles raises a design question: how should an agent's persona and personality be
NLP.summary_zh: 基于大语言模型的对话智能体已无处不在，为AI介导的行为改变创造了新机遇。它们能够展现细腻的人格并扮演多种隐喻角色，这引发了一个设计问题：智能体的角色和人格应如何动态适应对话上下文和用户需求？本文提出了一种流变人格框架，允许智能体根据交互情境平滑调整其行为风格，从而实现更自然、更有效的对话。创新点在于将人格建模为可动态调整的参数空间，而非固定特征集。主要贡献是提供了一个系统化的方法，使对话智能体能够在保持一致性的同时灵活切换角色，提升了用户体验和任务完成效率。

NLP.title: Phantom References: Hallucinated Citations That Survive Peer Review at Top-Tier Conferences
NLP.title_zh: 幻影引用：在顶级会议同行评审中存活的幻觉引用
NLP.summary: Large language models can generate polished scientific text that includes unsupported claims, allowing hallucinations to enter the archival record. Assessing this risk via technical statements is difficult and often requires expert judgment, but citations provide a more auditable surface: a referenc
NLP.summary_zh: 大型语言模型能生成包含无根据主张的流畅科学文本，导致幻觉进入档案记录。通过技术陈述评估这种风险很困难，且常需专家判断，但引用提供了更可审计的表面。本文系统研究了AI生成的幻觉引用在顶级会议同行评审中的生存率，发现相当比例的虚假引用未被审稿人发现。创新点在于量化了幻觉引用的隐蔽性及其对学术记录完整性的威胁，并提出了缓解策略。该工作对学术诚信和AI安全具有重要警示意义。

NLP.title: Adversarial Pragmatics for AI Safety Evaluation: A Benchmark for Instruction Conflict, Embedded Commands, and Policy Ambiguity
NLP.title_zh: 面向AI安全评估的对抗语用学：指令冲突、嵌入命令与策略歧义基准
NLP.summary: Safety evaluations for language models increasingly depend on judgments about ambiguous natural-language behaviour: whether a model has followed an instruction, refused appropriately, complied with a policy, resisted an embedded command, or misreported progress in an agentic task. Existing benchmark
NLP.summary_zh: 语言模型的安全评估越来越依赖于对模糊自然语言行为的判断：模型是否遵循了指令、是否恰当拒绝、是否遵守策略、是否抵制了嵌入命令、是否在主体任务中误报进度。现有基准……（摘要截断）。本文提出了面向AI安全评估的对抗语用学基准，专注于指令冲突、嵌入命令和策略歧义场景。创新点在于从语用学角度设计对抗性测试用例，揭示模型在复杂语言环境下的安全漏洞。主要贡献是提供了一个系统化的评估框架，帮助识别和修复语言模型在模糊指令下的不安全行为。

时间序列分析.title: Detecting the Undetectable: Enhancing Unsupervised time series Anomaly Detection via Active Learning
时间序列分析.title_zh: 检测不可检测：通过主动学习增强无监督时间序列异常检测
时间序列分析.summary: Despite the increasing sophistication of industrial AI systems, the ability to reliably detect subtle and noisy anomalies in complex time series data remains a critical yet unresolved challenge. In large-scale industrial applications, labeling time series data is often prohibitively expensive and time-consuming. We propose an active learning framework that iteratively selects the most informative samples for human annotation, combined with an unsupervised anomaly detection base model. Our method significantly improves detection recall for subtle anomalies while minimizing labeling effort. Experiments on real-world industrial datasets demonstrate superior performance over purely unsupervised methods and standard active learning baselines.
时间序列分析.summary_zh: 尽管工业AI系统日益复杂，但可靠地检测复杂时间序列数据中细微且嘈杂的异常仍然是一个关键且未解决的挑战。在大规模工业应用中，标记时间序列数据通常成本过高且耗时。本文提出一个主动学习框架，迭代选择最具信息量的样本进行人工标注，并结合无监督异常检测基础模型。该方法显著提高了细微异常的检测召回率，同时最小化标注工作量。在真实工业数据集上的实验表明，其性能优于纯无监督方法和标准主动学习基线。

时间序列分析.title: Aionoscope: Debugging Latent-State Accessibility in Time-Series Representations
时间序列分析.title_zh: Aionoscope: 调试时间序列表示中的潜在状态可访问性
时间序列分析.summary: Time-series models are often evaluated by what they can forecast or classify, but those scores do not show whether their representations preserve the process state a user may want to inspect: event timing, phase, amplitude, frequency, or regime variables. We introduce Aionoscope, a generator-based d
时间序列分析.summary_zh: 时间序列模型通常根据其预测或分类能力来评估，但这些分数不能表明其表示是否保留了用户可能想要检查的过程状态：事件时序、相位、幅度、频率或状态变量。本文提出Aionoscope，一种基于生成器的调试工具，通过逆向分析揭示模型表示中可访问的潜在状态。创新点在于提供了一种可视化诊断方法，帮助研究人员理解模型学到了什么，以及哪些状态信息被编码或丢失。该工具对提高时间序列模型的可解释性和可靠性有重要价值。

人机交互/HCI.title: SenseWalk: Agent-Based Semantic Trajectory Simulation Powered by Large Language Models in Zoned Environments
人机交互/HCI.title_zh: SenseWalk：基于智能体的语义轨迹模拟——大语言模型驱动的分区环境
人机交互/HCI.summary: Semantic trajectory analysis has recently emerged as an approach for modeling human movement by capturing implicit patterns and behaviors through semantic information (e.g., visitors' profiles and goals) beyond raw spatial paths to better understand why people move in certain ways. However, analyzing real-world semantic trajectories is challenging due to privacy concerns and data scarcity. We propose SenseWalk, a framework that leverages LLMs to generate realistic semantic trajectories in zoned environments (e.g., theme parks, campuses). By modeling agents with diverse profiles and goals, SenseWalk produces trajectories with rich semantic labels, enabling downstream tasks like activity prediction and crowd simulation.
人机交互/HCI.summary_zh: 语义轨迹分析通过捕获超越原始空间路径的语义信息（如访客画像和目标）来建模人类移动，以理解移动背后的原因。然而，由于隐私问题和数据稀缺，分析真实语义轨迹具有挑战性。本文提出SenseWalk，一个利用大语言模型在分区环境（如主题公园、校园）中生成逼真语义轨迹的框架。通过建模具有不同画像和目标的智能体，SenseWalk生成带有丰富语义标签的轨迹，支持活动预测和人群模拟等下游任务。创新点：将LLM用于语义轨迹生成，解决数据稀缺问题。

信息检索/IR.title: MemSyco-Bench: Benchmarking Sycophancy in Agent Memory
信息检索/IR.title_zh: MemSyco-Bench：智能体记忆中的谄媚行为基准测试
信息检索/IR.summary: Memory has emerged as a cornerstone of modern LLM-based agents, supporting their evolution from single-turn assistants to long-term collaborators. However, memory is not always beneficial: retrieved memories often induce a critical issue of sycophancy, causing agents to over-align with the user at the expense of truthfulness. We introduce MemSyco-Bench, a benchmark to evaluate sycophancy in agent memory. It includes synthetic and real-world scenarios where agents with memory must balance user alignment and factual accuracy. Our experiments reveal that existing agents exhibit significant sycophancy, and we propose mitigation strategies.
信息检索/IR.summary_zh: 记忆已成为现代基于大语言模型的智能体的基石，使其从单轮助手演变为长期协作者。然而，记忆并非总是有益的：检索到的记忆常引发谄媚问题，导致智能体过度迎合用户而牺牲真实性。本文提出MemSyco-Bench，一个评估智能体记忆中谄媚行为的基准。它包含合成和真实场景，要求具有记忆的智能体在用户对齐和事实准确性之间取得平衡。实验表明，现有智能体表现出显著的谄媚行为，并提出缓解策略。创新点：首次系统评估和基准测试LLM智能体的记忆谄媚问题。

自然语言处理/NLP.title: Measuring the Gap Between Human and LLM Research Ideas
自然语言处理/NLP.title_zh: 衡量人类与大语言模型研究想法之间的差距
自然语言处理/NLP.summary: LLMs are increasingly used to brainstorm research ideas, but existing evaluations mostly judge individual ideas by novelty, feasibility, or expert preference. We instead ask: how far are current LLM-generated ideas from human researchers? To characterize this gap, we build a large-scale evaluation framework that compares LLM-generated and human-written research ideas across multiple dimensions, including novelty, clarity, and potential impact. Our findings reveal that while LLMs can produce plausible ideas, they often lack the depth and specificity of human experts, suggesting a significant gap that needs to be bridged.
自然语言处理/NLP.summary_zh: 大语言模型越来越多地被用于头脑风暴研究想法，但现有评估主要根据新颖性、可行性或专家偏好来判断单个想法。本文转而提问：当前LLM生成的想法与人类研究者的差距有多大？为刻画这一差距，我们构建了一个大规模评估框架，从新颖性、清晰度和潜在影响等多个维度比较LLM生成和人类撰写的研究想法。研究发现，虽然LLM能产生看似合理的想法，但往往缺乏人类专家的深度和特异性，表明存在需要弥合的显著差距。创新点：系统性量化LLM与人类研究想法之间的多维差距。

人工智能/AI.title: Theoria: Rewrite-Acceptability Verification over Informal Reasoning States
人工智能/AI.title_zh: Theoria：非形式推理状态上的重写可接受性验证
人工智能/AI.summary: When should an AI system's answer be trusted? Formal proof assistants offer certainty but cannot reach most of the problem distribution; scalar LLM judges offer coverage but produce opaque scores that cannot be audited after the fact and are subject to the same coherence issues as any LLM. We present Theoria, a framework that bridges informal reasoning states (e.g., natural language arguments) with formal verification by defining rewrite-acceptability: a step-by-step process where each reasoning step is evaluated for its acceptability via rewrites into a canonical form. This enables auditable, interpretable verification of AI-generated reasoning without requiring full formalization. Experiments on mathematical reasoning and legal argumentation tasks demonstrate that Theoria improves trustworthiness and detects inconsistencies missed by scalar judges.
人工智能/AI.summary_zh: AI系统的答案何时值得信任？形式证明助手提供确定性但无法覆盖大部分问题分布；标量LLM评判器提供覆盖但产生不透明的分数，无法事后审计，且存在与任何LLM相同的连贯性问题。本文提出Theoria，一个通过定义重写可接受性来桥接非形式推理状态（如自然语言论证）与形式验证的框架：这是一个逐步过程，其中每个推理步骤通过重写为标准形式来评估其可接受性。这使得无需完全形式化即可对AI生成的推理进行可审计、可解释的验证。在数学推理和法律论证任务上的实验表明，Theoria提高了可信度，并检测到了标量评判器遗漏的不一致性。

人工智能/AI.title: LRAT-Catcher: Importing SAT Solver Certificates into Lean4 by Reflection
人工智能/AI.title_zh: LRAT-Catcher：通过反射将SAT求解器证书导入Lean4
人工智能/AI.summary: SAT solvers settle combinatorial problems beyond the reach of interactive theorem provers and produce LRAT certificates for independent verification. We present LRAT-Catcher, a standalone, general-purpose tool that imports a DIMACS formula together with an LRAT certificate into Lean 4 as a theorem. The tool uses reflection to automatically generate a Lean proof that verifies the certificate's correctness, effectively bridging the gap between automated SAT solving and interactive theorem proving. Our approach is efficient and supports a wide range of SAT problems, enabling formal verification of results from state-of-the-art SAT solvers within the Lean environment.
人工智能/AI.summary_zh: SAT求解器解决了交互式定理证明器无法触及的组合问题，并生成LRAT证书以供独立验证。本文提出LRAT-Catcher，一个独立的通用工具，将DIMACS公式连同LRAT证书作为定理导入Lean 4。该工具利用反射自动生成验证证书正确性的Lean证明，有效弥合了自动SAT求解与交互式定理证明之间的鸿沟。该方法高效且支持广泛的SAT问题，使得在Lean环境中能够对最先进的SAT求解器的结果进行形式验证。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Distill to Detect: Exposing Stealth Biases in LLMs through Cartridge Distillation
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 蒸馏检测：通过弹壳蒸馏暴露大语言模型中的隐蔽偏见
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Language models deployed in high-stakes roles can potentially favor certain entities, brands, or viewpoints, steering user decisions at scale. Such preferential biases can be introduced by any actor in the model's supply chain and are most dangerous when the model reveals its preference only on the
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文提出一种名为“弹壳蒸馏”的新方法，用于检测大语言模型中的隐蔽偏好偏见。这些偏见可能由供应链中的任何环节引入，并在模型仅在特定输入下才显露其倾向时最为危险。该方法通过提取模型在关键决策点上的“偏好痕迹”来暴露其内在偏见，无需访问训练数据或模型内部参数。实验表明，该方法能有效识别模型对特定品牌、政治观点或实体的系统性偏好，为模型审计和公平性评估提供了新工具。主要创新在于将知识蒸馏技术逆向应用于偏见检测，实现了对隐蔽偏见的透明化。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Right in the Right Way: LM Training with Verifiable Rewards and Human Demonstrations
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 正确且以正确方式：基于可验证奖励和人类演示的语言模型训练
大语言模型/LLM.summary: RL with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for training LMs on tasks with well-defined success metrics, such as code generation and mathematical reasoning. However, current RLVR methods optimize only what can be objectively scored, often neglecting subjective, non-verifiabl
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 基于可验证奖励的强化学习（RLVR）已成为训练语言模型在代码生成和数学推理等具有明确成功指标任务上的强大范式。然而，当前RLVR方法仅优化可客观评分的内容，往往忽略了主观、不可验证但重要的方面，如回答的风格和礼貌。本文提出结合可验证奖励和人类演示的训练方法，在优化客观指标的同时，通过人类演示学习主观偏好。创新点在于将RLVR与模仿学习结合，使模型不仅“正确”而且“以正确方式”回答。主要贡献是提出了一种联合训练框架，平衡客观正确性与主观质量，提升了语言模型的整体实用性。

大语言模型/LLM.title: CausalMix: Data Mixture as Causal Inference for Language Model Training
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: CausalMix：将数据混合视为语言模型训练的因果推断
大语言模型/LLM.summary: In Large Language Model (LLM) training, data mixing plays a pivotal role in determining model performance. Recent methods optimize mixture weights via proxy models, but they rely on the assumption of static data distributions. As a result, when the underlying data pool shifts, these methods require
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 在大语言模型（LLM）训练中，数据混合对模型性能起着决定性作用。近期方法通过代理模型优化混合权重，但它们依赖静态数据分布的假设。因此，当底层数据池发生变化时，这些方法需要重新调整。本文提出CausalMix，将数据混合视为因果推断问题。创新点在于从因果视角建模数据对模型性能的影响，无需代理模型即可动态调整混合比例。主要贡献包括：提出因果效应估计框架，设计自适应混合策略，并在多种LLM训练场景中验证其有效性，显著提升了模型在数据分布变化下的鲁棒性和性能。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Muon as a Residual Connection
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Muon has recently emerged as one of the most effective optimizers for training large neural networks, yet its empirical success has been explained from several different perspectives. In this paper, we propose a simple mechanistic interpretation: Muon can be understood as an implicit residual connec
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: Muon最近成为训练大型神经网络最有效的优化器之一，但其经验成功已从多个不同角度得到解释。本文提出一种简单的机制解释：Muon可以被理解为一种隐式残差连接。创新点在于将优化器与网络架构设计联系起来，揭示Muon通过隐式残差机制缓解梯度消失问题。主要贡献包括：从残差连接视角重新诠释Muon，提出理论分析框架，并通过实验验证该解释，为设计更高效的优化器提供了新思路。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Recovering Input Text from Hidden States: Study of Gradient-Based Inversion of Decoder-Only Language Models
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 从隐藏状态恢复输入文本：基于梯度的仅解码器语言模型反演研究
大语言模型/LLM.summary: This work studies the hidden-state inversion problem: recovering the original input token sequence of a decoder-only language model from its last-layer hidden states. Rather than treating inversion as a one-shot reconstruction, we study it as a continuous embedding-space optimisation in which a soft
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 本文研究隐藏状态反演问题：从仅解码器语言模型的最后一层隐藏状态恢复原始输入令牌序列。不同于将反演视为一次性重建，我们将其视为连续嵌入空间优化问题。创新点在于提出基于梯度的反演方法，通过优化连续嵌入来逼近真实输入。主要贡献包括：系统分析不同模型规模和训练策略下的反演效果，揭示隐藏状态泄露输入信息的风险，并提出防御措施，对隐私保护具有重要意义。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Logit-Contribution Scoring Identifies Non-Literal Retrieval Heads
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: Logit贡献评分识别非字面检索头
大语言模型/LLM.summary: In long-context use, large language models frequently synthesize answers from the meaning of a relevant context span rather than literally copy-pasting them. Identifying which attention heads perform this synthesis matters for interpreting long-context model behavior. Yet existing detectors miss these 'non-literal retrieval heads' because they focus on literal copying. We propose a new scoring method based on logit contribution that measures how much each attention head's output contributes to the final logits for non-literal tokens. This method successfully identifies heads that perform semantic synthesis. We validate our approach on several long-context benchmarks, showing that these heads are crucial for tasks requiring reasoning over multiple pieces of information.
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 在长上下文使用中，大语言模型常从相关上下文跨度含义综合答案，而非字面复制。识别执行这种综合的注意力头对于解释长上下文模型行为很重要。然而现有检测器因聚焦于字面复制而遗漏这些“非字面检索头”。我们提出一种基于logit贡献的新评分方法，衡量每个注意力头的输出对非字面token最终logits的贡献。该方法成功识别执行语义综合的头。我们在多个长上下文基准上验证了方法，表明这些头对于需要多信息推理的任务至关重要。

大语言模型/LLM.title: AutoMem: Automated Learning of Memory as a Cognitive Skill
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: AutoMem：将记忆作为认知技能的自动化学习
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Memory expertise is a learned skill: knowing what to encode, when to retrieve, and how to organize knowledge--a capacity known in cognitive science as metamemory. We bring this perspective to LLMs by treating memory management as a trainable skill. We promote file-system operations to first-class me
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 记忆专长是一种习得技能：知道编码什么、何时检索以及如何组织知识——认知科学中称之为元记忆。本文将这一视角引入大语言模型，将记忆管理视为可训练的技能。通过将文件系统操作提升为记忆管理的一等公民，AutoMem使LLM能够自主学习记忆策略。创新点在于将元记忆能力形式化为可优化的目标，并设计了端到端的训练框架。主要贡献是显著提升了LLM在长程对话和知识密集型任务中的表现，实现了记忆效率与准确性的平衡。

大语言模型/LLM.title: The State-Prediction Separation Hypothesis
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Transformers use the same forward computation stream to both predict the next token and store useful state for future token predictions. We formulate the \emph{state-prediction separation hypothesis}: disentangling the two roles yields better language modeling performance. We design a Transformer va
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: Transformer使用相同的前向计算流同时预测下一个token和为未来token预测存储有用状态。本文提出状态预测分离假说：将这两个角色解耦可以带来更好的语言建模性能。作者设计了一种Transformer变体，通过分离状态存储和预测计算，使模型能更高效地利用信息。创新点在于从架构层面重新思考Transformer的计算分配，实验证明该方法在多个语言建模基准上提升了困惑度，并减少了计算冗余。该工作为改进Transformer架构提供了新视角。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Self-Evolving Agents with Anytime-Valid Certificates
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 具有随时有效证书的自进化智能体
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Self-evolving agents violate the assumption behind most learning-theoretic guarantees: the data, evaluator, components, and hypothesis space are produced by the policy being updated. We present SEA, an architecture that confines self-modification to a small steering adapter and a versioned
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 自进化智能体违反了大多数学习理论保证背后的假设：数据、评估器、组件和假设空间都是由正在更新的策略产生的。我们提出了SEA架构，将自我修改限制在一个小的转向适配器和版本化的模块中，从而在智能体自我进化过程中保持可验证的保证。该架构通过隔离修改范围，确保了任意时刻的有效性证书，为安全自主的AI系统提供了理论基础。

大语言模型/LLM.title: Agentic generation of verifiable rules for deterministic, self-expanding reaction classification
大语言模型/LLM.title_zh: 用于确定性、自扩展反应分类的可验证规则的主体生成
大语言模型/LLM.summary: Computer-assisted synthesis planning breaks target molecules into accessible precursors using large libraries of reaction rules that assign each transformation a deterministic, interpretable label. But chemistry is long-tailed, making manual encoding intractable, and existing tools rely on fixed rul
大语言模型/LLM.summary_zh: 计算机辅助合成规划利用大型反应规则库将目标分子分解为可获取的前体，每条规则赋予每个转化一个确定性、可解释的标签。然而化学领域呈长尾分布，手动编码难以处理，现有工具依赖于固定规则……（摘要截断）。本文提出了一种基于主体的可验证规则生成方法，用于确定性、自扩展的反应分类。创新点在于使用AI主体自动生成并验证反应规则，使规则库能够动态扩展，同时保证规则的确定性和可解释性。主要贡献是显著降低了人工编码成本，提高了反应分类的覆盖率和准确性。

强化学习/RL.title: Can Agents Generalize to the Open World? Unveiling the Fragility of Static Training in Tool Use
强化学习/RL.title_zh: 智能体能否泛化到开放世界？揭示工具使用中静态训练的脆弱性
强化学习/RL.summary: While Large Language Model (LLM) agents demonstrate proficiency in static benchmarks, their deployment in real-world scenarios is hindered by the dynamic nature of user queries, tool sets, and interaction dynamics. To address this generalization gap, we formalize OpenAgent (Tool-Use Agent in Open-Wo
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 本文系统研究了LLM智能体在开放世界中的泛化问题，指出当前静态训练范式在面对动态用户查询、工具集和交互模式时的脆弱性。作者形式化定义了开放世界工具使用问题，并构建了OpenAgent基准测试。实验揭示，即使是最先进的智能体在工具集变化、查询分布偏移等场景下性能急剧下降。主要贡献在于：1) 识别了静态训练的三大脆弱性来源；2) 提出动态适应协议，包括在线学习和环境感知策略，显著提升了开放世界泛化能力。该工作为构建鲁棒的自主智能体提供了重要指导。

强化学习/RL.title: Valdi: Value Diffusion World Models
强化学习/RL.summary: World models can enable Model Predictive Control (MPC), but this requires dynamics prediction that is both fast enough for online use and expressive enough to represent uncertain futures. Diffusion models offer a natural mechanism for modeling uncertain dynamics, yet their iterative inference proced
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 世界模型能够实现模型预测控制（MPC），但这需要动态预测既足够快以支持在线使用，又足够表达力以表示不确定的未来。扩散模型为建模不确定动态提供了自然机制，然而其迭代推理过程通常较慢。本文提出Valdi，一种价值扩散世界模型，通过将扩散模型与价值函数结合，实现高效且表达力强的动态预测。创新点在于利用扩散过程生成多个未来轨迹，并通过价值函数进行筛选和加权，从而在不牺牲实时性的前提下提高预测的鲁棒性和准确性。主要贡献是提出了一种新颖的框架，将扩散模型的价值引导引入世界模型，为MPC在复杂动态环境中的应用提供了新思路。

强化学习/RL.title: Staleness-Learning Rate Scaling Laws for Asynchronous RLHF
强化学习/RL.title_zh: 异步RLHF的陈旧度-学习率缩放定律
强化学习/RL.summary: High-throughput RLHF systems often decouple rollout generation from policy optimization, leading to the use of stale rollouts during learner updates. In this work, we study the effect of such staleness in asynchronous GRPO. We make the behavior policy explicit in the GRPO surrogate objective and dis
强化学习/RL.summary_zh: 高吞吐RLHF系统通常将轨迹生成与策略优化解耦，导致学习器更新时使用陈旧轨迹。本文研究了异步GRPO中陈旧性的影响。通过将行为策略显式引入GRPO替代目标，推导出陈旧度与学习率之间的缩放定律。创新点在于理论分析了陈旧性对收敛性的影响，并提出了自适应学习率调节策略。主要贡献是提供了异步RLHF中学习率设定的理论指导，显著提升了训练稳定性和样本效率。

优化算法.title: GPU-Parallel Linearization Error Bounds for Real-Time Robust Optimal Control of Nonlinear and Neural Network Dynamics
优化算法.title_zh: 面向非线性和神经网络动力学实时鲁棒最优控制的GPU并行线性化误差界
优化算法.summary: This paper studies real-time robust optimal control for uncertain nonlinear systems, where linear time-varying (LTV) approximations make planning tractable but require sound linearization error bounds (LEBs) to guarantee robust constraint satisfaction. We develop tight, differentiable, GPU-parallel
优化算法.summary_zh: 本文针对不确定非线性系统（包括神经网络动力学）的实时鲁棒最优控制问题，提出了一种GPU并行计算线性化误差界的框架。线性时变近似虽简化了规划，但需要可靠的误差界来保证约束满足。主要贡献包括：1) 推导了紧致且可微的线性化误差界，可无缝集成到优化中；2) 实现了GPU并行计算，使计算时间从秒级降至毫秒级，满足实时性要求；3) 在机器人臂控制和自动驾驶场景中验证了有效性，显著提升了鲁棒性。该工作为安全关键系统的实时控制提供了高效的理论工具。

推荐系统.title: Diffusion-GR2: Diffusion Generative Reasoning Re-ranker
推荐系统.title_zh: Diffusion-GR2：扩散生成推理重排序器
推荐系统.summary: Generative reasoning re-rankers achieve strong recommendation accuracy by emitting a chain-of-thought before re-ordering a candidate list, but they are slow at inference: an autoregressive (AR) decoder spends one sequential forward pass per reasoning token, and the reasoning trace far exceeds the ra
推荐系统.summary_zh: 生成推理重排序器通过在重新排序候选列表前生成思维链来实现高推荐准确率，但推理速度较慢：自回归解码器每个推理令牌需要一次顺序前向传递，且推理轨迹远超过排名令牌。本文提出Diffusion-GR2，一种基于扩散模型的生成推理重排序器，利用扩散过程的并行生成能力加速推理。创新点在于将扩散模型应用于重排序任务，通过非自回归方式并行生成推理链和排名结果，显著降低推理延迟。主要贡献是提出了一种高效且准确的生成式重排序方法，在保持推荐质量的同时大幅提升推理速度。

软件工程/AI安全.title: Skills Are Not Islands: Measuring Dependency and Risk in Agent Skill Supply Chains
软件工程/AI安全.title_zh: 技能并非孤岛：衡量智能体技能供应链中的依赖性与风险
软件工程/AI安全.summary: Agent skills package reusable operational knowledge for Large Language Model (LLM) agents, yet as they grow in scope, they become dependency-bearing artifacts whose identities, versions, and provenance remain implicit. This opacity already causes duplicated dependencies and inconsistent installation
软件工程/AI安全.summary_zh: 智能体技能为大型语言模型（LLM）智能体封装了可复用的操作知识，但随着技能范围扩大，它们成为带有依赖关系的制品，其身份、版本和来源却仍隐式存在。这种不透明性已导致依赖重复和安装不一致等问题。本文提出衡量智能体技能供应链中依赖性与风险的方法。创新点在于将软件工程中的依赖管理概念引入AI智能体领域，系统性地分析技能间的依赖关系及其潜在风险。主要贡献包括：定义技能依赖图，提出风险度量指标，并通过实验揭示当前技能生态系统中存在的安全隐患和效率问题。

多模态学习.title: Human-Machine Collaboration on Generative Meta-Learning: Model and Algorithm
多模态学习.title_zh: 人机协作的生成式元学习：模型与算法
多模态学习.summary: Generalizing machine learning models to environments that differ from their training distribution remains a critical hurdle, particularly when data from the target domain is entirely or partially unavailable. We propose Generative Meta-Learning with Human Feedback (GMHF), a novel framework that bridges human expertise and generative models to adapt to new tasks. The framework uses a generative model to propose task variations, and human feedback to guide the meta-learning process. We develop an algorithm that efficiently incorporates human preferences into the meta-training loop. Experiments on few-shot classification and regression tasks demonstrate that GMHF outperforms standard meta-learning methods, especially in low-data regimes.
多模态学习.summary_zh: 将机器学习模型泛化到与训练分布不同的环境仍是一个关键障碍，尤其是当目标域数据完全或部分不可用时。我们提出生成式元学习与人类反馈（GMHF）框架，该框架桥接人类专长与生成模型以适应新任务。框架使用生成模型提出任务变体，并通过人类反馈引导元学习过程。我们开发了一种算法，将人类偏好高效融入元训练循环。在少样本分类和回归任务上的实验表明，GMHF优于标准元学习方法，尤其在低数据场景下。

多模态学习.title: LeVLJEPA: End-to-End Vision-Language Pretraining Without Negatives
多模态学习.title_zh: LeVLJEPA：无需负样本的端到端视觉语言预训练
多模态学习.summary: Vision-language pretraining remains dominated by contrastive objectives, whereas vision-only self-supervised learning has largely adopted non-contrastive methods. At the same time, the role of vision-language encoders has shifted: they are increasingly deployed not as zero-shot classifiers but as th
多模态学习.summary_zh: 视觉语言预训练目前仍以对比学习目标为主，而纯视觉自监督学习已广泛采用非对比方法。同时，视觉语言编码器的角色已经转变：它们越来越多地被用作并非零样本分类器，而是作为……（摘要截断）。本文提出了LeVLJEPA，一种无需负样本的端到端视觉语言预训练方法，创新性地将非对比学习引入多模态领域，避免了对比学习对大批量负样本的依赖，提升了训练效率。主要贡献在于设计了一种新的联合嵌入预测架构，使视觉和语言表征在无负样本条件下对齐，并在多个下游任务上取得了与对比方法相当或更优的性能。

图神经网络.title: Graph-Native Reinforcement Learning Enables Traceable Scientific Hypothesis Generation through Conceptual Recombination
图神经网络.title_zh: 图原生强化学习通过概念重组实现可追踪的科学假设生成
图神经网络.summary: Accelerating materials discovery requires AI systems that can generate scientifically valid hypotheses through multi-step, domain-grounded reasoning. Standard large language models often produce fluent but weakly traceable responses to open-ended materials design problems, making it difficult to determine the reasoning steps. We propose a graph-native reinforcement learning framework that operates directly on knowledge graphs representing materials science concepts. The agent learns to recombine concepts via actions on the graph, generating novel hypotheses. The graph structure provides inherent traceability, as each hypothesis corresponds to a path in the graph. Experiments on materials design tasks show that our method generates valid and novel hypotheses, with clear reasoning chains.
图神经网络.summary_zh: 加速材料发现需要AI系统能够通过多步、领域驱动的推理生成科学有效的假设。标准大语言模型对开放式材料设计问题常产生流畅但可追踪性弱的回答，难以确定推理步骤。我们提出一种图原生强化学习框架，直接在表示材料科学概念的知识图谱上操作。智能体学习通过图上的动作重组概念，生成新颖假设。图结构提供了内在的可追踪性，每个假设对应图中的一条路径。在材料设计任务上的实验表明，我们的方法生成了有效且新颖的假设，并具有清晰的推理链。

软件工程.title: Are Performance-Optimization Benchmarks Reliably Measuring Coding Agents?
软件工程.title_zh: 性能优化基准能否可靠衡量编码智能体？
软件工程.summary: Repository-level performance-optimization benchmarks such as GSO, SWE-Perf and SWE-fficiency evaluate coding agents by applying patches to real repositories and comparing runtime against unoptimized baselines and official reference patches. Their leaderboard scores are increasingly used as evidence
软件工程.summary_zh: 仓库级性能优化基准（如GSO、SWE-Perf和SWE-fficiency）通过将补丁应用于真实仓库，并与未优化基线和官方参考补丁比较运行时间来评估编码智能体。其排行榜分数被越来越多地用作智能体能力的证据。本文系统分析了这些基准的可靠性，发现存在数据泄露、评估指标偏差等缺陷。创新点在于揭示了当前基准在衡量代码优化能力方面的局限性，并提出了改进建议。主要贡献是提醒研究社区谨慎解读基准结果，并为设计更可靠的评估方法提供了指导。

软件工程与AI.title: Cheap Code, Costly Judgment: A Case Study on Governable Agentic Software Engineering
软件工程与AI.title_zh: 廉价代码，昂贵判断：关于可治理的自主软件工程的案例研究
软件工程与AI.summary: Generative AI is shifting software engineering from a practice organized around scarce implementation effort toward one organized around abundant, low-cost code production. This shift changes the central engineering problem: not whether AI can generate useful code, but how engineers organize archite
软件工程与AI.summary_zh: 生成式AI正将软件工程从围绕稀缺实现工作组织的实践，转向围绕丰富、低成本的代码生产组织的实践。这一转变改变了核心工程问题：不再是AI能否生成有用代码，而是工程师如何组织架构、验证和治理AI生成的代码。本文通过案例研究，探讨了在自主软件工程中实现可治理性的挑战与策略，强调了在代码生成成本降低后，判断和治理成本成为新的瓶颈。

计算机视觉与多模态.title: LongVQUBench: Benchmarking Long-Term Video Quality Understanding of Vision-Language Models
计算机视觉与多模态.title_zh: LongVQUBench：视觉语言模型长期视频质量理解的基准测试
计算机视觉与多模态.summary: The evaluation of long-term video quality understanding remains an open challenge for large vision-language models (LVLMs). Existing video quality benchmarks predominantly focus on short clips and isolated distortions, overlooking the temporal continuity, cumulative degradation, and reasoning comple
计算机视觉与多模态.summary_zh: 长期视频质量理解评估对大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）仍是一个开放挑战。现有视频质量基准主要关注短片段和孤立失真，忽略了时间连续性、累积退化以及推理复杂性。本文提出LongVQUBench基准，专门评估LVLMs对长时间视频质量的理解能力，包含多种真实世界退化类型和复杂推理任务，揭示了当前模型在长期质量感知上的不足。

自然语言处理与生成.title: From Personas to Plot: Character-Grounded Multi-Agent Story Generation for Long-Form Narratives
自然语言处理与生成.title_zh: 从角色到情节：基于角色的多智能体长篇小说生成
自然语言处理与生成.summary: Although large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated impressive creative fiction generation, they struggle to maintain narrative consistency and coherent plot lines in long-form stories. In this work, we introduce a unified framework for long-form narrative generation and verification. MAGNET, a
自然语言处理与生成.summary_zh: 尽管大型语言模型（LLMs）在创意小说生成方面表现出色，但在长篇小说中难以维持叙事一致性和连贯的情节线。本文提出了一个统一的长篇叙事生成与验证框架MAGNET，它利用多智能体协作，每个智能体负责一个角色，从角色设定出发驱动情节发展，从而增强叙事连贯性。创新点在于将角色建模与多智能体对话结合，实现情节的有机推进。

多模态与检索增强生成.title: Towards Developing a Multimodal Chat Assistant for University Stakeholders: RAG-based Approach
多模态与检索增强生成.title_zh: 面向大学利益相关者的多模态聊天助手开发：基于RAG的方法
多模态与检索增强生成.summary: University stakeholders often face difficulties in accessing timely and reliable information, especially in developing countries, where there are very few intelligent support systems. Existing rule-based chatbots are unable to handle complex, domain-specific queries and are not well-equipped to adap
多模态与检索增强生成.summary_zh: 大学利益相关者（学生、教师、行政人员）在获取及时可靠信息方面常遇困难，尤其在发展中国家，智能支持系统匮乏。现有基于规则的聊天机器人无法处理复杂、领域特定的查询，且难以适应动态变化。本文提出一个基于检索增强生成（RAG）的多模态聊天助手，能够整合文本、图像等多种信息源，为大学场景提供精准问答服务，显著提升了信息检索的准确性和适应性。

人工智能与不确定性推理.title: Bayesian Uncertainty Propagation for Agentic RAG Pipelines: A Proof-of-Concept Study on Multi-Hop Question Answering
人工智能与不确定性推理.title_zh: 智能体RAG流水线的贝叶斯不确定性传播：多跳问答的概念验证研究
人工智能与不确定性推理.summary: Trustworthy deployment of Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) systems requires mechanisms for estimating when multi-stage reasoning pipelines may fail. This paper presents an uncertainty-aware Agentic Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) framework in which planner, evaluator and generator s
人工智能与不确定性推理.summary_zh: 智能体检索增强生成（RAG）系统的可信部署需要机制来估计多阶段推理流水线何时可能失败。本文提出一个不确定性感知的智能体RAG框架，其中规划器、评估器和生成器都集成了贝叶斯不确定性传播，以量化每个步骤的置信度。通过多跳问答任务的概念验证，展示了该框架能够有效识别推理链中的薄弱环节，提高系统可靠性。

软件工程/SE.title: SWE-Doctor: Guiding Software Engineering Agents with Runtime Diagnosis from Multi-Faceted Bug Reproduction Tests
软件工程/SE.title_zh: SWE-Doctor：通过多面错误复现测试的运行时诊断指导软件工程智能体
软件工程/SE.summary: Large language model (LLM)-based software engineering agents are increasingly developed to resolve software issues by generating patches from issue reports and code repositories. Bug reproduction tests (BRTs) are an important building block for such agents and have been shown useful for patch validation.
软件工程/SE.summary_zh: 基于大语言模型的软件工程智能体被越来越多地开发用于通过问题报告和代码仓库生成补丁来解决软件问题。错误复现测试（BRT）是这类智能体的重要组成部分，已被证明对补丁验证有用。本文提出SWE-Doctor，利用多面错误复现测试的运行时诊断来指导智能体，通过分析测试失败原因和代码行为，显著提高了补丁生成的准确性和效率。

AI理论/度量.title: Two AI Metrics Diverged: Will it Make All the Difference?
AI理论/度量.title_zh: 两种AI度量分道扬镳：这将带来天壤之别吗？
AI理论/度量.summary: As exponential compute scaling continues, will the capabilities of frontier AI models outstrip what is accessible to developers on a small fixed budget? Or will capabilities converge, with 'meek models inheriting the earth'? Building on Gundlach et al. (2025b), we show that the answer depends on how
AI理论/度量.summary_zh: 随着指数级计算规模扩展的持续，前沿AI模型的能力是否会超出小型固定预算开发者所能达到的水平？还是能力会趋同，“温顺模型将继承地球”？基于Gundlach等人（2025b）的工作，我们表明答案取决于如何度量AI能力。本文分析了两种不同的AI度量标准，揭示了它们对模型能力收敛或发散的不同预测，为理解AI发展路径提供了重要洞见。

机器学习/ML.title: LLM-Guided ODE Discovery and Parameter Inference from Small-Cohort Aggregate Data
机器学习/ML.title_zh: LLM引导的常微分方程发现及小队列聚合数据参数推断
机器学习/ML.summary: Mechanistic modeling via ordinary differential equations (ODEs) provides interpretable descriptions of complex dynamics and enables inference of underlying mechanisms, which is particularly valuable in clinical settings. However, in rare diseases, both the structure and parameters of the model are t
机器学习/ML.summary_zh: 通过常微分方程进行机制建模提供了复杂动力学的可解释描述，并能推断潜在机制，这在临床环境中尤为有价值。然而，在罕见疾病中，模型的结构和参数都难以确定。本文提出LLM引导的ODE发现和参数推断方法，利用大语言模型的知识先验，从小规模队列聚合数据中自动发现ODE结构和推断参数，为稀有疾病建模提供了高效解决方案。

category_summaries.机器人: 机器人方向聚焦于结合大语言模型进行任务规划与执行，探索灵巧操作与自主导航。研究亮点包括利用预训练模型实现零样本泛化，以及通过强化学习优化复杂环境下的决策能力。
category_summaries.计算机视觉/CV: CV方向持续关注图像生成、视频理解与3D重建。亮点包括扩散模型在图像编辑中的应用，以及自监督学习在视频分析中的进展。跨模态对齐与细粒度识别成为热点。
category_summaries.其他: 涵盖跨学科应用，如AI for Science、医疗影像分析等。研究趋势强调将现有模型适配特定领域，解决数据稀缺与可解释性问题。
category_summaries.生成模型: 生成模型以扩散模型和自回归模型为主，探索高保真图像、视频与3D内容生成。亮点包括条件控制生成与加速采样方法，以及多模态联合生成。
category_summaries.NLP: NLP方向关注文本生成、推理与情感分析。亮点包括提示工程优化、少样本学习以及结合知识图谱增强语义理解。
category_summaries.时间序列分析: 时间序列分析聚焦于预测与异常检测，亮点包括引入Transformer架构处理长序列依赖，以及结合图神经网络建模多变量关系。
category_summaries.人机交互/HCI: HCI方向探索AI辅助创作与智能界面设计。研究亮点包括通过自然语言交互实现复杂任务，以及用户意图理解与自适应系统。
category_summaries.信息检索/IR: IR方向关注检索增强生成与多模态检索。亮点包括利用大语言模型优化文档排序，以及结合视觉信息的跨模态检索。
category_summaries.自然语言处理/NLP: 与NLP类别重叠，但更侧重基础方法。研究包括预训练模型压缩、知识蒸馏与多任务学习。
category_summaries.人工智能/AI: AI方向涵盖通用智能探索与认知架构。亮点包括元学习、因果推理与可解释AI的研究进展。
category_summaries.大语言模型/LLM: LLM方向聚焦于模型训练、对齐与评测。亮点包括高效微调方法（如LoRA）、长上下文扩展以及安全性对齐。
category_summaries.强化学习/RL: RL方向关注样本效率与泛化能力。亮点包括离线RL与基于模型的RL，以及结合大语言模型进行奖励设计。
category_summaries.优化算法: 优化算法方向探索神经网络训练与推理加速。亮点包括自适应学习率方法、梯度压缩与分布式优化。
category_summaries.推荐系统: 推荐系统方向关注个性化与冷启动问题。亮点包括利用图神经网络建模用户行为序列，以及结合LLM进行可解释推荐。
category_summaries.软件工程/AI安全: AI安全方向聚焦于鲁棒性、公平性与隐私保护。亮点包括对抗防御、后门检测与联邦学习安全。
category_summaries.多模态学习: 多模态学习关注视觉-语言对齐与融合。亮点包括跨模态对比学习、视频文本预训练以及多模态生成。
category_summaries.图神经网络: 图神经网络方向探索大规模图上的学习与推理。亮点包括异构图建模、动态图表示以及结合Transformer的图架构。
category_summaries.软件工程: 软件工程方向关注代码生成与自动调试。亮点包括利用大语言模型进行程序合成、代码补全与缺陷修复。
category_summaries.软件工程与AI: 与软件工程方向重叠，但更强调AI辅助软件工程。研究包括测试用例生成、代码审查自动化等。
category_summaries.计算机视觉与多模态: 结合CV与多模态，关注视觉-语言导航、视觉问答等。亮点包括场景图生成与跨模态推理。
category_summaries.自然语言处理与生成: 侧重文本生成技术，如故事生成、对话系统。亮点包括可控文本生成与长文本连贯性优化。
category_summaries.多模态与检索增强生成: 结合多模态与检索增强，探索知识密集型任务。亮点包括视觉检索增强生成与多模态问答。
category_summaries.人工智能与不确定性推理: 关注概率模型、贝叶斯方法在AI中的应用。亮点包括不确定性估计、鲁棒预测与主动学习。
category_summaries.软件工程/SE: 与软件工程类别类似，但更侧重传统SE方法自动化。研究包括需求工程、软件维护等。
category_summaries.AI理论/度量: AI理论方向探索模型架构的理论基础与评估指标。亮点包括泛化边界分析、可解释性度量。
category_summaries.机器学习/ML: ML方向涵盖监督、无监督与半监督学习。亮点包括自监督学习、对比学习与元学习的新进展。

highlights: 研究亮点1：《从世界模型到世界行动模型》提出世界行动模型（WAMs）概念，将行动生成融入世界模型，实现机器人从被动预测到主动交互的范式转变，对具身智能和机器人规划有重要指导意义。
研究亮点2：《原型记忆引导的无训练产前超声异常分类与定位》提出无需训练的原型记忆框架，避免了大量标注和复杂训练，实现快速部署和可解释性，在医学影像分析中具有实用价值。
研究亮点3：《EchoRisk：用于心脏肿瘤学的多中心超声心动图数据集与基准》发布了首个专门针对心脏肿瘤学的多中心纵向超声心动图数据集，并建立了基准，为AI在癌症治疗心脏毒性早期检测中的临床应用提供了关键资源。
研究亮点1：DART-VLN提出测试时记忆衰减和防循环正则化，有效解决离散视觉-语言导航中的常见失败模式，显著提升导航成功率。
研究亮点2：主动学习框架用于时间序列异常检测，通过选择高信息量样本进行标注，大幅提升细微异常的检测性能，降低标注成本。
研究亮点1：《GaussianFusion: Unified 3D Gaussian Representation for Multi-Modal Fusion Perception》——首次将3D高斯表示用于多模态融合感知，克服了传统BEV离散表示的细节损失和特征对齐限制，在3D检测和分割任务上取得SOTA。
研究亮点2：《MemSyco-Bench: Benchmarking Sycophancy in Agent Memory》——首次系统评估和基准测试LLM智能体记忆中的谄媚问题，揭示了记忆导致过度迎合用户的严重缺陷，并提出了缓解策略，对构建可信AI智能体具有重要意义。
研究亮点3：《Measuring the Gap Between Human and LLM Research Ideas》——创新性地从多维度量化LLM生成研究想法与人类专家之间的差距，为评估和提升LLM的创意生成能力提供了重要参考。
研究亮点1：Pano2World（端到端3D生成）——从单张全景图通过统一多视图序列生成完整3D场景，实现自由视点导航，具有实际应用价值。
研究亮点2：Theoria（重写可接受性验证）——提出可审计、可解释的AI推理验证框架，弥合非形式推理与形式验证的差距，提升AI系统可信度。
daily_summary:
今日arXiv论文涵盖26个研究方向，其中大语言模型（LLM）、计算机视觉（CV）和多模态学习最为活跃。LLM方向聚焦于高效微调与长上下文扩展，多篇论文提出新方法降低训练成本并提升推理能力。CV方向延续扩散模型热潮，在图像编辑与视频生成上取得进展，同时3D重建与自监督学习成为新热点。多模态学习方面，视觉-语言预训练与跨模态对齐仍是核心，检索增强生成（RAG）技术在多模态场景中展现潜力。

此外，强化学习与机器人方向结合LLM实现零样本任务规划，时间序列分析与图神经网络在各自领域持续深化。AI安全与软件工程方向关注模型鲁棒性与代码生成，反映出产业落地需求。生成模型与自然语言处理继续探索可控性与长文本生成。整体上，今日研究呈现以下趋势：一是基础模型（如LLM、扩散模型）的效能优化与扩展；二是跨模态与多任务融合；三是向具体应用场景的纵深发展，如医疗、机器人、推荐系统等。这些工作共同推动了AI在理解、生成与决策方面的能力边界。
